heading: Sponsor education and assistance
label: 1304a Sponsor education and assistance
notes: CodificationSection was enacted as part of the Cooperative and Small Employer Charity Pension Flexibility Act, and not as part of the Employee Retirement Income Security Act of 1974 which comprises this chapter.

children.heading: Definition
children.label: a Definition
children.text: In this section, the term “CSEC plan” has the meaning given that term in subsection (f)(1) of .section 1060 of this title

children.heading: Education
children.label: b Education
children.text: The Participant and Plan Sponsor Advocate established under shall make itself available to assist CSEC plan sponsors and participants as part of the duties it performs under the general supervision of the Board of Directors under .section 1304 of this titlesection 1304(b) of this title
